twoFactor.sectionDescription: Add a one-time code from an authenticator app on top of your password.
twoFactor.disableHint: Enter a code from your authenticator app (or a backup code) to turn it off.
twoFactor.enableHint: You'll scan a QR code and confirm a code right after signing up.
twoFactor.scanHint: Scan this QR code with an authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator, Aegis, 1Password).
twoFactor.qrAlt: QR code for two-factor authentication setup
twoFactor.invalidCode: That code is not correct. Please try again.
twoFactor.setupFailed: Could not start two-factor setup. Please try again.
twoFactor.backupHint: Each code works once. Keep them somewhere safe — they let you sign in if you lose your authenticator.
twoFactor.loginHint: Enter the code from your authenticator app.
twoFactor.backupLoginHint: Lost your device? Enter one of your backup codes instead. Each backup code works only once and becomes invalid after use.

common.refreshServerOnly: No bank query — only refreshes data already on the server
common.name: Name
common.passwordTooWeak: Password does not meet all requirements

serverOffline.title: Server unreachable
serverOffline.description: We can't reach the server right now. Check your connection and try again.

unexpected.title: Something went wrong
unexpected.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

account.dayAfterTomorrow: Scheduled for the day after tomorrow

search.title: Search transactions
search.textPlaceholder: Other party, purpose, note or attachment
search.linkModeHint: Pick the transaction to link with.

login.registrationDisabled: Registration is currently disabled by the administrator.
login.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a moment and try again.
login.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.credentialsDescription: Add or remove banks, sync now
settings.attributionsDescription: Credits and licences for third-party assets
settings.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.

dfs.title: DFS
dfs.note: Retirement provisioning of the Deutsche Flugsicherung GmbH.

fin4u.title: fin4u
fin4u.note: Retirement provisioning. There is no support for individual transactions as the frontend does not provide this information.

manual.title: Manual account
manual.note: A manual account: balance and transactions are entered by hand.

expectedTransactions.title: Expected transactions
expectedTransactions.toleranceHint: How closely the booked amount must match the expected amount to be detected automatically.

credentials.title: Bank connections
credentials.searchPlaceholder: Bank name, sort code or IBAN…
credentials.ibanMismatch: This IBAN does not belong to the selected bank.
credentials.alreadyExists: A {{bank}} connection with these credentials already exists.
credentials.connectFailed: Could not connect to {{bank}}. Please check the credentials.
credentials.syncFailed: Connected to {{bank}}, but the first sync failed. You can retry the sync later.
credentials.invalidCredentials: {{bank}} rejected the login. Please check your username and password.

fieldRule.phone_country_code: Must start with a country code, e.g. +49

twoFactor.description: A code was sent to your phone. Enter it to finish connecting.
twoFactor.failed: The code was invalid or has expired. Please start the sync again.

decoupledApproval.title: Please approve in your banking app
decoupledApproval.description: We're waiting for you to approve the request in your banking app. Open the app and confirm to let the sync continue.

autoSync.enabled_one: This account is synced automatically on a {{hours}}-hour schedule.
autoSync.enabled_other: These accounts are synced automatically on a {{hours}}-hour schedule.
autoSync.disabled_one: This account is not synced automatically because a second factor is required.
autoSync.disabled_other: These accounts are not synced automatically because a second factor is required.

groups.title: Account groups
groups.manageDescription: Drag accounts into custom groups for the overview
groups.description: Drag accounts into groups. Empty groups stay until you delete them.
groups.ungroupedEmpty: All accounts are assigned to a group.
groups.empty: Connect a bank first — then come back here to organise your accounts.
groups.saveFailed: Could not save the layout. Please try again.

detail.accountsEmpty: No accounts yet. They appear after the first successful sync.
detail.accountsEmptyManual: No accounts yet. Create your first manual account.
detail.hideHint: Account is not displayed and not counted in total or group balances.
detail.syncEnabledHint: When disabled, this connection is skipped by "Sync all" in the overview and by the automatic background sync. Syncing it individually here is still possible. Handy for accounts with two-factor authentication and few transactions, where confirming it every time is a nuisance.
detail.displayNameHint: Shown in the overview. Leave empty to use the original name.
detail.balanceFactorHint: How much of this account's balance counts towards your total.
detail.saveFailed: Could not save the changes. Please try again.
detail.deleteDescription: Deleting the connection removes all accounts and transactions linked to it. This cannot be undone.
detail.deleteFailed: Could not delete the connection. Please try again.

manualTransactions.dayOfMonthHint: If a month doesn't have this day (e.g. 30th of February), the transaction is booked on the last day of that month.

enableBanking.step1: Create a free account and register a new application in the control panel at
enableBanking.step1Key: Choose how to generate a private RSA key and a certificate:
enableBanking.step1Info: Fill out information about your application:
enableBanking.step1Register: Click “Register”; the key file (.pem) is downloaded automatically.
enableBanking.step2: Add your bank via the “Link accounts” button in the control panel.
enableBanking.step3: Upload the key file below. When connecting you will be redirected to your bank to sign in.
enableBanking.callbackDescription: Copy the code and paste it into the waiting connection dialog.
enableBanking.callbackErrorDescription: The bank reported an error: {{error}}. Please start the sync again.
enableBanking.redirectNotAllowed: Enable Banking does not allow the redirect URL {{url}}. Whitelist it in your application in the control panel and connect again.
enableBanking.reuseApp: Your existing Enable Banking application is reused. The bank must be linked as an account in the <cp>control panel</cp>.
enableBanking.httpsRequired: Enable Banking requires Quaestor to be served over HTTPS. This page is currently served over HTTP; the connection will fail. Ask your administrator to set up HTTPS.
enableBanking.notActivated: Your Enable Banking application is not active yet. Link your bank in the control panel (“Link accounts”) first, then connect again.

version.title: Server Version
version.upToDate: Your server is up to date

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.loadError: API keys could not be loaded.
apiKeys.createdTitle: Copy your new API key now
apiKeys.createdHint: This is the only time the key is shown. Store it somewhere safe — you can't see it again.

twoFactor.codeDescription: We sent a confirmation code to your phone. Enter it to continue the sync.
twoFactor.decoupledDescription: Please open your {{bank}} app and approve the request. We're waiting for your confirmation.
twoFactor.authorizeDescription: Sign in at {{bank}} via the link and approve access. You will land on a page showing a code — paste it here.

sync.rateLimited: {{bank}} received too many requests. Please try again later.

transaction.pendingHint: Pending — not finally booked yet and may still change

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.includeContentHint: When off, the notification only names the account and hides amounts, the other party, balance and threshold.

triggerHint.expected_transaction: Notify me when a transaction I entered manually as expected is booked.
triggerHint.contract_overdue: Notify me when a contract payment is overdue by more than the grace period.
triggerHint.upcoming_shortfall: Notify me when contract payments due within the chosen period exceed the account balance.
triggerHint.transaction: Notify me when a booked transaction matches the criteria below.
triggerHint.balance_threshold: Notify me when an account's balance crosses the threshold in the chosen direction.
triggerHint.contract_amount_increased: Notify me when a contract payment comes in higher than before: more than three times its usual fluctuation, and at the latest once it deviates by 25% from the previous amount. Deviations below 1 € never trigger.
triggerHint.duplicate_transaction: Notify me when the same amount is booked twice to the same sender or recipient within the time window.
triggerHint.digest: Send me a regular summary: spending, income and transaction count for the period, compared to the one before.

pwa.intro: On phones, push notifications only work when Quaestor is installed as an app (added to your home screen).
pwa.ios: In your browser, tap the Share icon and choose “Add to Home Screen” (possibly under “more”), then open Quaestor from your home screen.
pwa.android: In Chrome, open the menu (⋮) and choose “Install app” or “Add to Home screen”.
pwa.desktop: Install Quaestor via the install icon in your browser's address bar to receive notifications even when the tab is closed.

notifications.accountsRequired: Please select at least one account.
notifications.testFailed: Test notification could not be delivered.
notifications.testDenied: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings.
notifications.testUnsupported: Push notifications are not supported on this device.

contracts.title: Contracts
contracts.overdueBanner_one: The next payment is {{count}} month overdue. Is this contract still active?
contracts.overdueBanner_other: The next payment is {{count}} months overdue. Is this contract still active?
contracts.createToAssign: No contracts on this account — create one first.
